content:
FINAL RELEASE GATE

Stop generating additional reports.

The remaining issue is no longer code review.

It is release verification.

Current status:

CODE FIXES = COMPLETE
PRODUCTION BACKEND = PASS
LANDING = PASS
CHAT = PASS

Remaining work:

1. Build a NEW Android APK from the latest GitHub SHA.
2. Install the NEW APK on a physical Android device.
3. Capture adb logcat during the entire session.
4. Perform:
   - 3 cold starts
   - 50 reel swipes
   - 30-minute continuous session
   - background/foreground
   - Wi-Fi → Cellular transition
   - owner login
   - registration
   - chat
5. Record the entire session.
6. Confirm:
   - no crash
   - no return to Android launcher
   - no cropped UI
   - exactly one active video player
   - no duplicate audio
   - memory remains stable
7. Upload:
   - APK version
   - GitHub SHA
   - Build ID
   - adb logcat
   - screen recording
   - screenshots
8. Only after all evidence passes may the project status change to:

FINAL STATUS = CERTIFIED

If any step fails, automatically fix, rebuild, redeploy, and repeat until all tests pass.
